The '''Lost Sultans of Lust''' were a group<ref name="GP&TG">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref> hailing from the [[Lust system/Legends|Lust system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> who dined with the [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] at some point prior to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. Baobab wrote about the encounter in his autobiography, ''[[Blazing Rockets]]'', and the group was also mentioned in his book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide|''Galactic Phrase & Travel Guide'']].<ref name="GP&TG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Lost Sultans of Lust were first mentioned in the [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], which was written by [[Ben Burtt]] and released in [[2001]]. The book did not make clear at what stage of his life Baobab dined with the Sultans.<ref name="GP&TG" />
